name: Tukaimon

signature_move.name: Bad Message
signature_move.description: Makes the opponent cry with insults packed with negative energy.

description: Tukaimon may resemble Patamon in appearance, but its personality is the complete opposite from Patamon's. A rather twisted creature, it acts as a familiar for Digimon such as Devimon . It has a quick-tempered personality that's prone to getting into fights, and it will attempt to immediately settle things by getting physical with a battle. Its Special Move is making the opponent cry with insults packed with negative energy ( Bad Message ).
